---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a spec mismatch, documentation error, or inconsistency
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Component**

Which document or section is affected?

- [ ] spec/receipt.md
- [ ] spec/verification.md
- [ ] spec/architecture.md
- [ ] spec/threat-model.md
- [ ] spec/versioning.md
- [ ] spec/examples.md
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] Other: ___

**Description**

A clear description of the issue.

**Expected behavior**

What the spec should say or how production behavior differs.

**Observed behavior**

What you observed that contradicts the spec.

**Additional context**

Any additional information that would help resolve this.
